WordPress Research Fellows

Build. Test. Ship.

A 10-week paid summer fellowship where undergraduate Software Engineering students build, test, and ship real WordPress tooling alongside faculty mentors.

Apply Now →

A deep commitment to your research success

Discover the value of a summer spent doing real WordPress research, and the mentorship, funding, and support behind every fellow along the way.

  • Gain real-world experience

    On a transformative research fellowship, you work full time in a small track team, shipping real WordPress tooling the department relies on every day.

  • Earn a paid fellowship

    Every fellow receives a competitive 10-week stipend, and the program office connects you with scholarships, travel grants, and publication support.

  • Advance your career trajectory

    Research and mentorship help you expand your knowledge, get published, and stand out to employers and graduate programs alike.

Your research journey

  • Explore research opportunities

    Search across our tracks — plugin architecture, editor UX, performance, security, and accessibility — and find the problem you want to own.

    Explore the program→

  • Find a faculty mentor

    Our faculty are leaders in their fields, and their guidance plays an enormous role in your research. See who you could be working with.

    Meet the team→

  • Discover funding and deadlines

    A paid 10-week stipend, plus awards that provide experiences, resources, and funding. Get info on eligibility, deadlines, and more.

    Apply now→
